method: Full-roster burn-scar fusion: Sentinel-2 L2A NBR + Landsat C2 L2 NBR + Sentinel-1 RTC SAR + MODIS-09A1 SR NBR + HLS L30/S30 NBR + MODIS-14A1 active-fire + Sentinel-3 SLSTR FRP + Sentinel-3 SLSTR LST + MODIS-11A1 daily LST (ECOSTRESS substitute) + Sentinel-5P TROPOMI CO/NO2 anomaly + VIIRS VNP14IMG active-fire (granule count via CMR) + VIIRS VNP46A1 Black Marble persistence + MTG FCI L1c DGX-cache coverage signal. Fused via OR-logic with confidence weighted by agreement count. Persistence + combustion derived from BM + TROPOMI.
